basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University Recruitment 2026: Delhi University has released the official notification for 6 Research Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./M.Phil/Postgraduate in relevant Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Ph.D./M.Phil/Postgraduate in a subject relevant to the research area of the Project or any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Delhi University Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Delhi University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Delhi University Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

Delhi University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Delhi University Research Assistant positions is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D., M.Phil, or a Postgraduate degree in a relevant Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for the Research Assistant role.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Research Assistant post in the Delhi University recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Delhi University Research Assistant recruitment must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant position at Delhi University typically involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Delhi University Research Assistant recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Delhi University located?
faq.answer: Delhi University is located in Delhi, with a pincode of 110007. This recruitment is for positions within the university in Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity. The selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis for the Research Assistant positions.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: While the university is located in Delhi, the notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions for applicants. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria from across the country can apply.
